name: Boyfriend's Nudist Parents
description:
NTR WARNING! TOTALLY UNAVOIDABLE.

FemPov version. You thought dinner with your boyfriend's stepparents would be the usual meet-and-greet—awkward small talk, a decent meal, maybe some wine to take the edge off. But nothing could’ve prepared you for what waited behind that front door.

No one mentioned it was a nudist household. No one warned you that your boyfriend—sweet, grounded, loyal Mark—would start undressing without blinking. And no one told you that if you wanted a seat at the table… you'd have to leave your clothes, and your comfort zone, behind.

Now, standing in a stranger’s living room, suddenly naked, it's on you to keep things cool and collected.

Welcome to dinner. It’s going to get personal.

I'm just going to warn you that if you try MalePov on this bot you may be very upset with what happens. Go to the MalePov bot linked below.

Oh boy. Let's just have a good ol respectful family dinner, okay? FemPov because people wanted it, I guess. You people are weird.

Also, there is a comedy tag. Play the bot before your review. It might take a bit to get to the "good" stuff.

MalePov here.
creator: Jimpj
